subcodes.title: Words to Mirza Munir, spoken on 1912-03-26
subcodes.first_line: The poor man [Kheiralla] has become nameless and debased both in this world and in the Kingdom. What a high honor he had!
subcodes.first_line_orig: بیچاره گمنام شد و در ملک و ملکوت ذلیل گردید چه عزتی داشت ولی چون قدر ندانست
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge
